note: Pinned refs, toolchains, and component versions sufficient to reproduce the build (REQ-BUILD-0050/0080/0097). Mirrored into core.component_version at bootstrap (REQ-DATA-0143).

engine.ref_note: advanced from 52834be: adds derive-shared-address CLI + bsvcurve sha256/from_bytes_reduce, exposing the additive-tweak derivation for Stage 3 (no new crypto). DEC-0004.
engine.run_note: The Windows .exe will not execute under the harness shells (V-ENV-0001); the engine is built and run in WSL/Linux, which is the deployed (container) execution path.
